data.name: Sex Casino
data.detailed_description:
Casino and prostitutes What else do you need to have fun? At Sex Casino you will live the Vegas experience. You can spend all day playing games of chance in the casino and become a millionaire and when you get tired you can go back to your hotel room and spend your money on the best prostitutes in town.

You will also live a story that will motivate you to earn more money to save your protagonist from total ruin while you improve as a player and lover.

The best gambling games you can find in a casino.

Poker, Blackjack, craps, Bingo, different slot machines and more games to enjoy betting your money. Everything you can expect from a real casino you will have in Sex Casino.

You can return to the hotel whenever you want and hire the services of the best prostitutes in town. You can choose between 5 of them, each one more expensive. You can choose between 4 different poses with each prostitute to satisfy your needs. There are a total of 20 different sexual scenes.
(more prostitutes and scenes will be added with future updates).

Meet the prostitutes you can hire to bring to your hotel:

Nancy is 24 and loves video games.

Sophia is 22 years old and loves to play in casinos.

Pamela is 25 and loves to play golf.

Tasha is 27 and loves to cook.

Alice is 23 and is addicted to sex.

data.short_description: Casino and prostitutes What else do you need to have fun? At Sex Casino you will live the Vegas experience.
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文, 義大利文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 簡體中文, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 / 11
  • 處理器: i5 or equivalent
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Nvidia GeForce GTX 1060 | AMD Radeon HD 6870
  • 儲存空間: 7 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 / 11
  • 處理器: i7 or equivalent
  • 記憶體: 12 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Nvidia GeForce GTX 3060 | AMD Radeon HD 6870 or greater
  • 儲存空間: 7 GB 可用空間

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS: Windows 10 / 11
  • Processor: i5 or equivalent
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: Nvidia GeForce GTX 1060 | AMD Radeon HD 6870
  • Storage: 7 GB available space
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • OS: Windows 10 / 11
  • Processor: i7 or equivalent
  • Memory: 12 GB RAM
  • Graphics: Nvidia GeForce GTX 3060 | AMD Radeon HD 6870 or greater
  • Storage: 7 GB available space
